title: Subterranean Border Defense Act
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
crs_summary: Subterranean Border Defense Act This bill requires recurring annual reporting by U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) on the implementation of a strategic plan to counter illicit cross-border tunnel operations. Currently, CBP is only required to report once no later than one year after the plan's development.
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
